architecture/overview.title: Architecture Overview
architecture/overview.description: The AgroGina Platform is built as a multi-tenant SaaS application using a monorepo structure with pnpm workspaces.

features/accounting.title: Accounting & Finance
features/accounting.description: The AgroGina platform includes a full-featured accounting module built on double-entry bookkeeping principles. It provides a chart of accounts with multi-country templates, journal entry management, invoice lifecycle handling, financial reporting, cost center tracking, and worker payment processing -- all scoped to individual organizations via multi-tenant isolation.

features/compliance.title: Compliance & Certifications
features/compliance.description: The Compliance module provides end-to-end management of agricultural certifications, compliance checks, corrective actions, and automated audit reminders. It is implemented as a NestJS module (ComplianceModule) backed by Supabase and integrates with the Notifications and Email modules.

features/inventory.title: Inventory & Stock Management
features/inventory.description: The Inventory & Stock Management system handles warehouse management, inventory tracking, and a multi-step reception batch workflow that covers receiving goods, quality control, decision routing, and financial processing. It is built with NestJS and Supabase across two primary modules: WarehousesModule and ReceptionBatchesModule.

features/marketplace.title: Marketplace
features/marketplace.description: The AgroGina Marketplace is a B2B e-commerce platform that allows agricultural organizations to list, browse, and trade products. It combines two product sources -- dedicated marketplace listings and inventory items flagged for sale -- into a unified storefront. The system includes seller profiles, shopping carts, quote requests, orders with stock management, and a review system.

features/satellite-analysis.title: Satellite Analysis Service
features/satellite-analysis.description: The AgroGina Platform's satellite service provides multi-provider access to Sentinel-2 data through a unified interface, supporting both Google Earth Engine (GEE) and Copernicus Data Space Ecosystem (CDSE/openEO).

features/subscriptions.title: Subscriptions & Module System
features/subscriptions.description: The AgroGina Platform uses a subscription-based module system that enables features based on the organization's plan tier. This document covers the implementation of subscriptions, module configuration, and access control.

features/tasks-workforce.title: Tasks & Workforce
features/tasks-workforce.description: The Tasks & Workforce system covers task lifecycle management, worker profiles, time tracking, piece-work payment tracking, and automated reminders. All endpoints are multi-tenant, scoped by organization_id, and protected by JWT authentication with CASL-based permission guards.

getting-started/installation.title: Installation
getting-started/installation.description: This guide will help you set up the AgroGina Platform development environment on your local machine.

getting-started/quick-start.title: Quick Start
getting-started/quick-start.description: Get the AgroGina Platform running locally in about 10 minutes.

guides/adding-feature.title: Adding a Feature
guides/adding-feature.description: This guide walks through adding a new feature to the AgroGina Platform.

guides/desktop-app-plan.title: Desktop App Implementation Plan
guides/desktop-app-plan.description: Standalone desktop version using Tauri, with full org data export/import and offline-first architecture.
